title: GYAKORLATI ÚTMUTATÓK, AMELYEK SEGÍTENEK A GAZDÁLKODÓKNAK A TELEPI JÁRVÁNYVÉDELMI KOCKÁZATOK KEZELÉSÉBEN
description: A collection of practical guides for poultry farmers, translated from French regulations, to assist in drafting their own risk-based disease prevention plans. They outline how to implement avian influenza biosecurity measures tailored to various production systems and farm conditions.
